name: ev4-decision-kernel

scripts.validate:mvk: node kernel/validator/validate-mvk.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-source-cards.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-consumption-boundaries.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-evidence-workspace.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-elementor-doc-coverage.mjs

description: Kernel-local MVK schema, fixture, source-card, consumption-boundary, evidence-workspace, Elementor V4 doc coverage, and behavioral coverage validator package.
